name: Devpost Hackathons
description: A platform where students can find and participate in hackathons that are currently open. Multiple competitions are always accepting submissions or registrations — great for building your portfolio and gaining experience even as a beginner.

name: Student Center
description: Provides a quiet place for students to study. During finals week of fall, winter, or spring quarters, the building is open 24 hours a day. Both open spaces and bookable study rooms are available.

name: ICS Tutoring Center
description: Located in ICS 2, Room 110. Fellow ICS students are available on Wed. and Th. from 12 to 5 PM and Fri. from 12 to 7 PM. Tutoring available for various ICS courses. No appointment necessary!

name: OAI Study Center
description: Located in ICS 2, Room 136. Tutoring available, by appointment, from 12 to 5 PM Monday to Friday, free of charge. Tutoring available for various ICS courses by OAI's learning mentors.

name: UCI ANTrepreneur Center
description: Supports students interested in startups or tech innovation. Provides pitch help, mentorship, workshops, prototyping resources, and community events for aspiring founders.
